description: GeoClaw finite-volume hydraulic-hole/downstream-boil profile closure for the corrected-boundary Milestone 18 rapid-feature row.

source.notes: Derived from normalized GeoClaw h/u/v fields for hydraulic_hole_downstream_boil_seed_18; used only as bounded finite-volume fixture calibration with feature forcing disabled, finite-volume profile fast path enabled, and initial-mass preservation disabled for the open-boundary comparison.
